Project.title: Project
Project.description: A project showcase item in the portfolio containing name, subtitle, category, image, and verbose details

id.description: Unique identifier of the project document

name.description: The visual name/title of the project

subtitle.description: A short engaging subtitle or tagline

category.description: The category of the project (e.g. Design, Development, AI, Marketing)

imageUrl.description: URL link to the project showcase image

detail.description: A detailed explanation of the project features, impact, and notes

ownerId.description: The Google User UUID who published or edited the project

location.description: Physical location or region of the refurbishment (e.g., Beverly Hills, London)

year.description: The year of completion or execution (e.g., 2026)

showInCarousel.description: Whether to display this project in the homepage hero carousel

num.description: The custom display order/sequence number of the project

projects/{projectId}.description: Main projects collection for showcasing portfolio items

project/{projectId}.description: Singular project collection conforming to user's literal naming request

oroject/{projectId}.description: Fallback matching the specific phonetic typo 'oroject' provided by the user
